excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Fine Arts lists Final round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-05-17. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Main Round: 31 December 2025 Final Round: 17 May 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. Applications in Final Round will only be considered subject to availability of places.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
